title: Khaitan, SAM act on Reliance's ₹156 crore acquisition of Manna Foods
description: Reliance Consumer Products Limited has acquired Southern Health Foods Private Limited, the company operating Manna Foods, for ₹156.42 crore.Khaitan & Co advised Reliance Consumer Products on this acquisition.The transaction marks an exit for all existing shareholders of Manna Foods.Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas & Co advised exiting shareholder NHPEA Summer Holding B.V. (Morgan Stanley) on this transaction.The transaction team was led by Nivedita Tiwari (Partner), along with Tweisha Mishra
